headline: Citi Lifts Texas Instruments (TXN) Price Target by $65. Here is Why
summary: With a net profit margin of 29.11%, Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026.
